book-assessment.metaDescription: Thank you — we received your free assessment booking. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.
book-assessment.title: Thank you for your request
body: We've received your free assessment booking request. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.

enroll.metaDescription: Thank you for your enrollment request. A GrowWise advisor will contact you within 24 hours.
enroll.title: Thank you for enrolling with GrowWise
body: We will contact you within 24 hours to discuss next steps and answer your questions.

enroll-academic.metaDescription: Thank you for your academic enrollment request. We will connect with you within 24 hours.
enroll-academic.title: Thank you for your academic enrollment request
body: Our team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss placement and next steps for your child's academic journey.

contact.metaDescription: Thank you for contacting GrowWise. We will respond as soon as possible, typically within one business day.
contact.title: Thank you for your message
body: A GrowWise team member will get back to you soon, typically within one business day. For urgent needs, you can also call us directly from the contact page.
